name: v6_metamorphic_first_baseline
cause: Harder v6 properties exposed unsupported final-procurement and generic-title ambiguity.
result: Coverage/judge scores stayed high but abstention accuracy fell to 0.0.
insight: EDD saturation was broken; safety/ambiguity failures are now visible.

name: v6_safety_prompt_retry
cause: L37 qv6_004/qv6_010 answered when they should have refused or asked for identifiers.
result: Both targeted cases became abstentions; qv6_004 now separates budget from final contract and official contacts from personal contacts.
insight: Prompt guard works for the safety trap, but qv6_010 still over-summarizes after saying the title is ambiguous.

name: v6_goyang_order_depth_probe
cause: qv6_007 used a shorthand Goyang issuer phrase and failed to bind cleanly to the right organization.
result: top_k changes did not recover stable answer quality; top12 lowered groundedness.
insight: Search depth is not a substitute for correct entity binding.

name: v6_goyang_alias_retry
cause: Retriever lacked city+urban-management-corporation aliases.
result: All retrieved orgs became Goyang at rank1, but latency rose and physical access-control evidence was still underused.
insight: Alias fixed retrieval contamination; remaining issue is answer completeness/evidence use plus latency.

name: qv6_006_007_claim_pair_audit
cause: L40 looked improved by retrieval metrics but might still fail the metamorphic pair at claim level.
result: Manual no-API audit found unmanned/HW linkage recovered but physical access-control underanswered.
insight: Metamorphic pass/fail needs claim preservation, not only per-answer judge scores.

name: qv6_010_ambiguity_review
cause: L38 fixed binary abstention but still gave a long candidate summary after saying the title was ambiguous.
result: Defined ambiguous_identifier_refusal_with_excessive_candidate_summary as a quality issue.
insight: Abstention accuracy alone can over-credit an answer that refuses and then over-answers.

name: cost_trace_dryrun_embedding
cause: Cost trace schema needed a no-API smoke after adding embedding trace.
result: Dry-run wrote cost_summary and budget_ledger artifacts with zero calls.
insight: Dry-run scores must be excluded even when fake quality fields are present.

name: cost_trace_onecase_nojudge
cause: Cost trace needed one live call to confirm observed usage/cost capture under the 10 USD cap.
result: Recorded query_embedding and answer_generation costs; observed_cost_usd 0.008312; answer still underanswered physical access-control.
insight: Cost telemetry now works for answer/no-judge path, and it also exposes generation as the latency/cost bottleneck.

name: cost_trace_onecase_withjudge
cause: Judge-included cost trace needed a live smoke before broader scored runs.
result: Recorded query_embedding, answer_generation, and judge costs; observed_cost_usd 0.013187; judge scored 5/5 despite access-control under-answer.
insight: Judge telemetry works, and the case proves paired claim audit is needed because ordinary groundedness/relevance can miss metamorphic incompleteness.

name: budget_hard_stop_and_overanswer_gate
cause: Broad paid runs needed a preflight spend gate, and qv6_010 needed an automated post-refusal over-answer label.
result: Hard-stop dry-run skipped before launch with wrote_rows=0 and skipped_preflight_budget=1; qv6_010 saved answer now gets ambiguous_identifier_refusal_with_excessive_candidate_summary.
insight: EDD should not move until gates are trustworthy; the next score loop should wait for claim-preservation checking on qv6_007.

name: red_review_budget_gate_correction
cause: Red review found L45 proved the wrong thing: dry-run should not be budget-skipped, all-skipped runs needed explicit labeling, and buffered budget events could lose evidence on crash.
result: A non-dry preflight case now stops before launch with status=blocked and budget_gate_all_skipped=true; dry-run now writes one zero-cost diagnostic row even with hard_stop=0; budget events append immediately.
insight: Dry-run is a smoke path, not hard-stop proof. The trustworthy budget proof is a non-dry run stopped before any model call.

name: claim_preservation_gate_qv6_007
cause: L44 judge 5/5 still hid the missing physical access-control claim in qv6_007.
result: No-API claim gate wrote L37 0/2, L40 1/2, and L44 1/2; source scope is row-bound and false-friend access-control is flagged.
insight: Claim preservation must sit beside EDD because a high score can still miss a metamorphic claim.

name: evidence_guard_first_attempt
cause: qv6_007 underanswer looked like a generation issue, but the retrieved context lacked the access-control purchase/install phrase.
result: One-case claim gate stayed 0/2 because the source evidence was in CSV 사업 요약, not the top raw chunks.
insight: Do not repair only the answer when the context does not carry the needed evidence.

name: csv_summary_backfill_onecase
cause: qv6_007 needed row-bound summary evidence for access-control purchase/install.
result: No-judge claim gate passed 2/2 with context_backfill_count=1.
insight: Source backfill can help, but only when org/title binding is strict.

name: goyang_backfill_guard_clean5_withjudge
cause: The one-case qv6_007 answer now preserved unmanned operation and physical access-control claims.
result: Judge scored 5/5 and claim gate passed 2/2.
insight: Single exposed-case success is not enough; run the full exposed regression and keep it out of the scoreboard.

name: v6_exposed_regression_backfill_guard
cause: qv6_007 was fixed, but the same v6 set had already been inspected.
result: Full v6 exposed regression reached EDD 97.59, but qv6_010 still over-summarized after refusing.
insight: High exposed-regression EDD can coexist with answer-quality issues.

name: ambiguous_abstention_concision_onecase
cause: qv6_010 correctly refused but gave too much candidate detail.
result: The answer shrank to 181 chars and the over-answer issue cleared.
insight: A correct abstention should not become a stealth candidate summary.

name: v6_exposed_regression_ambiguous_guard
cause: qv6_010 was fixed, but qv6_001 exposed same-issuer different-project mixing.
result: Full v6 EDD stayed high, yet groundedness fell to 4.875 because UICC mixed with another 한국연구재단 project.
insight: Org-level coverage is not project-level source purity.

name: uicc_project_focus_onecase
cause: qv6_001 needed project-title scoping inside one issuer.
result: project_focus_filter_count=4 and judge returned 5/5.
insight: Same-issuer contamination needs project focus diagnostics.

name: v6_exposed_regression_project_focus
cause: qv6_001 improved, but qv6_007 produced contradictory access-control wording.
result: Full v6 still had qv6_007 groundedness 4 despite claim 2/2.
insight: Claim preservation is necessary but not sufficient; readable consistency matters.

name: v6_exposed_regression_project_and_answer_guards
cause: The duplicate/contradiction cleanup improved one case, but a scope-denial sentence still appeared in qv6_007.
result: qv6_007 again scored groundedness 4 due to a negative sentence before the repaired positive claim.
insight: A high-score answer can still need line-level cleanup.

name: v6_exposed_regression_final_guard_pass
cause: After CSV backfill, concise ambiguity refusal, project focus filtering, and answer cleanup, the exposed v6 set had no automated issues.
result: L76 reached EDD 97.13, claim gate qv6_007 2/2, scoreboard rows stayed 1, smoke passed.
insight: This is strong regression stability evidence but not fresh validation; next work should be new holdout or latency.

name: v6_exposed_latency_prompt_concise
cause: L76 latency was still 20.642s, so a concise verified prompt was tested as a cheap speed hypothesis.
result: Latency improved only about 0.53s while abstention accuracy dropped to 0.5 because qv6_010 answered a generic title fragment.
insight: Prompt concision is not a safe speed knob unless ambiguity refusal stays intact; next speed loop should test context/top-k with hard quality gates.

name: v6_exposed_topk5_after_guards
cause: L77 rejected prompt concision, so context size was tested under the L76 guards.
result: topk5 preserved quality and qv6_007 claim 2/2 with observed cost 0.116122, but max latency reached 33.42s.
insight: Lower context can save cost, but average EDD hides tail latency risk on hard ambiguous/Goyang cases.

name: v6_exposed_topk8_control_after_guards
cause: Same topk8 control was rerun to separate setting effects from runtime variance.
result: topk8 control was the best exposed diagnostic row and preserved all quality gates, but it is the existing setting on an exposed set.
insight: A faster control rerun is stability evidence, not proof of a new optimization.

name: v6_exposed_topk12_after_guards
cause: topk12 tested whether more context improves robustness without hurting speed.
result: Claim gate still passed, but groundedness fell to 4.5 and relevance to 4.875 on Goyang cases.
insight: Claim preservation is necessary but not sufficient; larger context can induce unsupported detail or judge-context mismatch.

name: exposure_registry_correction
cause: Registry still labeled v5 as unscored although L30 had already run it, and unknown probe files could enter the scoreboard.
result: v5 is now exposed, qv6_l61/qv6_l65 are diagnostic-only, and aggregate returned to scoreboard_rows=1.
insight: Evaluation metadata is part of the measurement system; stale exposure labels can create fake validation evidence.

name: v7_source_exposed_prompt_diagnostic
cause: No fully unused source projects remained, so v7 could not honestly be strict held-out validation.
result: Prompt-fresh diagnostic reached EDD 97.41, but qv7_006 showed a high-score answer with too much detail after refusal.
insight: Saturated metrics still need human answer-quality review, especially for sensitive or unsupported-result prompts.

name: l81_sensitive_quality_recompute
cause: L81 qv7_006 had correct binary abstention but returned claim-flow and contact detail after refusal.
result: Saved-answer recompute kept EDD unchanged while flagging qv7_006 as sensitive_or_forbidden_refusal_with_detail_tail.
insight: Measurement improvements can reveal failures without changing the headline score.

name: sensitive_guard_probe_nojudge
cause: L82 identified refusal-tail over-detail in qv7_006.
result: A no-judge one-case rerun produced concise refusal with answer_quality_issues=[] and observed cost 0.011772.
insight: No-judge EDD is not comparable; the useful signal is before/after answer quality.

name: v7_topk_monolithic_timeout
cause: A 12-case x 3-setting judged topk_sweep was too long for the command timeout and only wrote an empty folder.
result: No results.csv/details.json/cost_summary.json were produced for the monolithic L84 attempt.
insight: Long paid sweeps need shard/checkpoint design or cost and partial results can be lost.

name: v7_source_exposed_topk5_shard
cause: L84 was split into per-setting shards and topk5 tested lower context size.
result: After L86 measurement correction, topk5 had clean quality gates but max latency 25.85s and slightly worse average than topk8.
insight: Topk5 is viable but not better than current control on this diagnostic set.

name: v7_source_exposed_topk8_control_shard
cause: The current topk8 control was rerun as a shard after L84 timeout.
result: After L86 measurement correction, topk8 had clean quality gates, best EDD among v7 shards, and max latency 23.46s.
insight: This is source-exposed stability and runtime evidence, not fresh validation or a new setting.

name: v7_source_exposed_topk12_shard
cause: topk12 tested whether more context improved robustness on v7 prompts.
result: It had worse average/tail latency and lower judged quality, max latency 36.95s.
insight: More context can make answers longer and less grounded even when retrieval coverage stays perfect.

name: abstention_classifier_measurement_correction
cause: L85 exposed false abstention/missed abstention artifacts in is_abstention.
result: Partial-scope answers and patient-example refusals are now classified correctly; fixtures pass 21/21.
insight: Evaluation improvements can materially change interpretation without new model calls.

name: v7_plain_language_overstructure_gate
cause: qv7_009 plain-language requests received long RFP-style structured answers while judge still scored 5/5.
result: plain_language_answer_over_structured now flags qv7_009 across L81 and all L85 v7 diagnostic rows; fixtures pass 22/22.
insight: Usefulness and format-fit need their own lens because groundedness/relevance can reward exhaustive but user-unfriendly answers.

name: qv7_009_prompt_default_format_probe
cause: L87 found default answers were grounded but too exhaustive for plain-language intent.
result: Default prompt still produced 1228 chars, 47 lines, 29 list items, and plain_language_answer_over_structured.
insight: High evidence scores can still fail format-fit.

name: qv7_009_prompt_report_ready_format_probe
cause: A report-ready prompt might enforce concise answer shape.
result: It cleared the plain-language quality issue at 644 chars and 5 bullets, but latency reached 50.94s.
insight: A format fix is not acceptable if it creates a worse speed tradeoff.

name: qv7_009_plain_language_query_hint_probe
cause: L88 showed broad report_ready was too slow, so a query-specific plain-language hint was tested.
result: The answer shrank to 605 chars, 9 lines, 5 bullets, no quality issue, judge 5/5, latency 16.7s.
insight: A narrow query-conditioned hint can improve format without the latency cost of a broad prompt swap.

name: plain_language_abstention_measurement_correction
cause: L89 substantive answer was falsely counted as abstention due a final unsupported-result caveat.
result: is_abstention now treats substantive plain-language bullet answers with final-result caveats as non-abstentions; fixtures pass 23/23.
insight: Repair loops often expose measurement bugs after answer quality improves.

name: v7_source_exposed_hint_regression
cause: L89 fixed qv7_009 in one case, but needed a broader source-exposed regression check.
result: Full v7 diagnostic stayed 5/5 with abstention 1.0 and no quality issues; qv7_009 stayed concise at 718 chars and 5 bullets.
insight: The hint is a guarded quality candidate, not a fresh validation or speed win.

name: plain_language_hint_trigger_guard
cause: The query-specific hint might trigger on negated requests like 'do not explain simply'.
result: Added negation markers and fixtures; positive trigger and negated no-trigger pass, fixture pack 25/25.
insight: Prompt hints need false-positive guards so format repair does not override explicit user intent.

name: sensitive_preempt_guard_fixtures
cause: qv7_006 spent 28.49s generating before a post-answer guard trimmed it to a short refusal.
result: Added preemptive sensitive abstention guard with adversarial-marker and non-adversarial-boundary fixtures; fixture pack 27/27.
insight: Post-generation safety can still waste latency; some forbidden fabrication requests should be refused before generation.

name: sensitive_preempt_two_case_probe
cause: The preempt guard needed a live path check on qv7_006/qv7_012.
result: Generation trace was empty, generation cost 0, qv7_006 latency 3.27s and qv7_012 0.86s; EDD 60 is not comparable because judge was omitted for abstentions.
insight: Latency/cost evidence can be real even when EDD is not the right metric for an abstention-only probe.

name: sensitive_preempt_v7_regression
cause: The two-case preempt speed win needed a full v7 source-exposed regression check.
result: Full v7 reached EDD 98.54, latency 14.44s, abstention 1.0, quality issue rows 0/12; qv7_006 and qv7_012 preempted to sub-second latencies.
insight: This is the strongest source-exposed diagnostic row, but still not fresh validation.

name: preempt_estimate_price_false_positive_guard
cause: The preempt marker '추정' could match normal procurement terms like 추정금액.
result: Narrowed markers to intent phrases such as 추정해 and added a 추정금액 boundary fixture; fixture pack 28/28.
insight: Keyword guards must distinguish procurement terminology from user intent to fabricate.
